claimText: LSE requires departments or course convenors to classify authorised generative AI use in assessment as no authorised use, limited authorised use, or full authorised use, and to communicate the position to students.

citation.citationTitle: School position on generative AI - LSE
citation.publisher: The London School of Economics and Political Science
